verdict_reason: Button locator correctly uses role-based selector; status tag uses CSS class selector which is consistent with file patterns but deviates from Playwright best practices (Minor issue only, no functional impact).

todos.issue: Status tag uses CSS class selector '.govuk-tag' which may break if styling changes; no Playwright role for badges but consider using getByText() for better resilience
todos.fix: Consider replacing '.govuk-tag' with page.getByText('Amend', { exact: true }) if the text is unique on the page, or use a data-testid attribute on the tag in the frontend code for more stable selection
